rationale: The citing article's core framing, hypotheses, and analyses are built on Hoeffler (2003) and temporal construal theory, not on the cited paper. Castaño et al. (2008) appears only once in the Study 2 discussion as a brief corroboration that one observed decline pattern is consistent with prior work. The citation is not used to define constructs, derive hypotheses, borrow measures, or drive interpretation beyond that passing comparison.
